title: muehlenbeckia tiliifolia var. tiliifolia
intro: Muehlenbeckia tiliifolia var. tiliifolia, also known as Maire's cord, is a type of plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. It can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
